description: Represents an ACL for the ingress of an application component.

ACLID.description: The ACL ID is the unique identifier for this ACL.
ACLID.title: ACLID

IPRanges.description: The list of IP ranges in CIDR notation to match for this ACL.
IPRanges.title: IPRanges

action.description: The action to take for connections ingressing to this workload that match this ACL.
action.title: action

disabled.description: If true, the ACL is disabled and will not be applied.
disabled.title: disabled

name.description: The name of the ingress ACL.
name.title: name

port.description: The port to match for this ACL. If not set, the ACL will match all ports.
port.title: port

title: IngressACL
